steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The blank names what happens when "sleek, contemporary elements and traditional organic materials" exist "in a single design." The phrase "in a single design" is the clue — different things are combined into one whole.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. designation — a designation is a label or name given to something. Plug in: "the designation of sleek elements and organic materials in a single design" — this says the materials are being named, not combined. Does not match. Eliminated.

B. analysis — an analysis is an examination of parts. Plug in: "the analysis of sleek elements and organic materials in a single design" — this says the materials are being studied, not joined. Eliminated.

C. diffusion — diffusion means spreading out or scattering. Plug in: "the diffusion of sleek elements and organic materials in a single design" — this implies dispersal, the opposite of combining into one design. Eliminated.

D. synthesis — synthesis means combining different elements into a unified whole. Plug in: "the synthesis of sleek elements and organic materials in a single design" — this perfectly captures two different material types coming together in one design. Correct.
